research_verdict: Model dynasty value should be league-adjusted value above replacement rather than raw points
implementation_action: Add replacement/VORP layer before promotion

research_verdict: Rushing and receiving first downs and team first-down share are high-value signals

research_verdict: Snap share routes weighted opportunities first-down share red-zone and goal-line role outrank efficiency

research_verdict: RB peak is short and decline after age 27-28 must be visible

research_verdict: Prime window roughly age 23-29 with decline after 29

research_verdict: QB value must be VORP above replacement not raw fantasy points
rotowire_field_mapping: passing rushing stats plus replacement baseline

research_verdict: Rushing attempts yards and rushing first downs are the main QB separators in 1QB

research_verdict: Route participation target earning YPRR and first-down production matter more than snap share

research_verdict: TE premium should only exist if real VORP gap over TE replacement exists

research_verdict: Projections can be bounded context but must not dominate core value

research_verdict: ADP and consensus are sanity checks only not private value

research_verdict: Missing sparse data must not become zero and must widen uncertainty

research_verdict: Draft capital plus age-adjusted production market share YPRR breakout age early declare
